series_metadata.series_description: When an employee is imposed with discipline (i.e., working suspension, fine, non-working discipline) a Personnel Action (PA) form is created. The PA form allows Personnel to process the imposed discipline into OAK’s for payroll and work history purposes. The PA form is filed in the employee’s Personnel file for one year from the date of discipline is imposed.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until discipline becomes inactive then destroy., Paper: Shred
